title: Molecular Tumor Board
description: The Molecular Tumor Board workspace supports multidisciplinary oncology case review. Present somatic variant findings, copy number alterations, fusion events, and TMB/MSI status alongside clinical history for treatment decision support.
tips: Upload a patient-specific VCF or connect to an existing genomics upload to populate the variant panel.
Variants are annotated against ClinVar, OncoKB, and COSMIC — pathogenicity classifications appear alongside each variant.
The actionability panel highlights variants with FDA-approved or clinical trial therapies based on OncoKB tier.
TMB (Tumor Mutational Burden) and MSI status are calculated automatically and displayed as biomarker badges.
Document case discussion notes and treatment decisions in the Meeting Notes section for audit trail purposes.
